name: 古塔
description: 问景山下的古塔，塔内有四尊塑像，传说封印着恶鬼魍魉。塑像各对应一次复活机会，毁掉塑像即可令死者复生。

visual.prompt: Ancient Chinese pagoda at the foot of a mountain, dark and mysterious, oil painting style

name: 别家
description: 别家宅院，自卓和母亲居住之处。院中留有大盗王两入赘时的痕迹。

visual.prompt: Chinese traditional courtyard house, Republican era Shandong village, oil painting style

name: 熙宅
description: 熙家大宅，熙勤兼一家居住。门上曾被人钉纸条威胁。

visual.prompt: Chinese wealthy family mansion courtyard, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 医馆
description: 别熙乡医馆，由熙励辛（熙郎中）创办，现由良真继承。药房中有标着「慎用」的毒药瓷瓶。

visual.prompt: Chinese traditional medicine clinic, wooden cabinets with herbal drawers, oil painting style

name: 酒馆
description: 别熙乡集市上的酒馆，自卓和小节曾在此当伙计。守言曾在此骚扰小节。

visual.prompt: Chinese rural tavern in a market town, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 枯井
description: 熙宅附近的枯井，传说通向地下秘道。

visual.prompt: Abandoned dry well in a Chinese village, overgrown with weeds, oil painting style

name: 问景山
description: 别熙乡附近的山，山上有亭子和隐蔽洞穴。守言在此遇害。

visual.prompt: Chinese mountain with pavilion and hidden cave, autumn scenery, oil painting style
